pi_items.source: https://www.nchsoftware.com/point-of-sale/versions.html - Official NCH Software product page lists the application as 'Copper Point of Sale Software' (version 3.06 released 2018)

Unable to verify specific registry path through official documentation. NCH Software applications typically follow pattern HKCU\Software\[Vendor]\[Application], but exact path for Copper not found in accessible documentation

No documentation found confirming 'C:\CopperBackups' as a default or expected backup path. Official documentation references backup to network folders, CD/DVD, removable drives, or custom user-selected locations, but no specific default path mentioned

privileged_info_summary: Copper Point of Sale Software (version 3.06, released July 2018) is the official application name. The task uses synthetic retail data (customer and product CSV files). No verified information available about automatic backup on exit feature, C:\CopperBackups as a backup destination, or the specific registry path claimed.
